title: SKY BRIDGE I KYRGYZSTAN TRAVEL VIDEO I 4K DRONE CINEMATIC

notes: DRAFT CANDIDATE, LOWEST CONFIDENCE OF THIS BATCH -- flag for extra scrutiny before inclusion, do not commit without a second look. Produced in a cloud (Cowork) session while the bridge to the user's local machine was intermittently down; not cross-checked against the live exemplars directory for duplicates, not yet written into the repo. Sourced for the Sky Bridge (Bishkek) landmark -- a well-known, drone/Instagram-favorite Kyrgyzstan location distinct from the other Kyrgyzstan candidate in this batch (Explore The World 4K's general-landscape video), included specifically to give this location entry some subject diversity rather than only one generic 'wild beauty' angle. Verified this session via WebFetch of the YouTube oEmbed endpoint (https://www.youtube.com/oembed?url=https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=SoFRKacp938&format=json), which returned title='SKY BRIDGE I KYRGYZSTAN TRAVEL VIDEO I 4K DRONE CINEMATIC', author_name='JishinnRaJ', author_url='https://www.youtube.com/@JishinnRaJ-oq3sh', provider_name='YouTube' -- confirms a real, currently-public video with this exact title/creator. The watch-page fetch (for CC-license/upload-date/duration/description) returned HTTP 429 (rate-limited) this session, same as the other three candidates in this batch; not retried further or worked around. `license_category` is therefore the conservative all-rights-reserved default on absence of a positive CC finding, not a directly confirmed one -- re-check when reachable. A WebSearch this session ('"JishinnRaJ" youtube drone Kyrgyzstan travel channel') returned only a single, thin result (a Threads handle, @jishinnraj) and no press coverage, no analytics-tracker listing, no evidence of an established following -- markedly weaker corroboration than every other candidate in this batch. The channel handle itself ('@JishinnRaJ-oq3sh') carries YouTube's auto-generated random-suffix pattern used for unclaimed custom handles, which in this session's judgment is a soft signal (not proof) of a newer or smaller channel. `award_or_showcase_provenance` is left null: no contest/broadcaster/festival attribution found. `scores` are `scores_provenance: manually_estimated` and were deliberately set at or slightly below this pack's documented 'un-curated personal account' floor (flaviufpv-madeira-fanal-forest-fpv.json's 0.72/0.72) specifically because of the weak creator-reach corroboration above -- this is a case where the subject (an iconic, inherently photogenic landmark) is strong but the creator-legitimacy evidence is weak, and this record deliberately does not let the former compensate for the latter. Under this project's Bayesian-style framing (see the Bayesian launch prompt delivered earlier this session): this candidate should genuinely be flagged for the user's own sign-off rather than silently included or excluded -- it is real and on-topic, but this session's confidence in it is materially lower than the other three drafts in this batch. `composite_score` is not a call to the repo's real `compute_composite_score` (no shell access to the user's environment this session); it was computed via an equivalent equal-weighted-mean formula run in this session's own Python: (0.70+0.71+0.72)/3 = 0.71. `composition` stays null.

editorial_style.pacing_notes: Not independently reviewed via playback this session. 'long-form-cinematic' is inferred only from the title convention and a standard (non-/shorts/) watch URL, not from an actual viewing -- weak evidence, flagged as such.
